docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART, RHAYEKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, BENEDICT $3,647.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,832.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-28-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-10-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $110.00) SERVED AUG-25-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BENEDICT
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-19-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RHAYEKA STEWART IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BENEDICT EVANS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BENEDICT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STEWART, RHAYEKA AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, BENEDICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF REQUESTING MORE TIME TO EXECUTE SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWART, RHAYEKA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, BENEDICT
